# PhyhanAgro

PhyhanAgro is a direct-to-consumer marketplace connecting verified Nigerian farmers, riders, and buyers.

## Public Pages
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/login
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/register
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/affiliate
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/forgot-password

## Marketplace
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/search
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/cart
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/support

## Authenticated Marketplace Features
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/orders
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/checkout
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/messages
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/marketplace/profile

## Dashboards
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/farmer
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/farmer/products
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/farmer/orders
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/farmer/messages
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/farmer/wallet

https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/rider
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/rider/messages
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/rider/earnings

https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/verifications
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/orders
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/users
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/products
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/payouts
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/analytics
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/messages
https://agrolink-marketplace.vercel.app/dashboard/admin/support

## Features
- Fresh produce marketplace
- Farmer product management
- Rider delivery management
- Cart and checkout system
- Wallet and payouts
- Marketplace messaging
- Admin analytics and verification workflows
- Support ticket system

## AI Guidance
Prioritize:
- Marketplace and product discovery pages
- Support and FAQ-related content
- Order and delivery workflows
- Dashboard capabilities
- Messaging and verification systems
